title: Rich Roasted Syrian Mushroom Casserole
description: A comforting Syrian dish featuring roasted mushrooms in a rich and crumbly fold, perfect for a cold evening, and is FODMAP friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toss the mushrooms with olive oil, salt, and black pepper in a bowl until they are evenly coated.
Spread the mushrooms on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
While the mushrooms are roasting, toast the pita bread slices in the oven for 5 minutes.
In a separate pan, heat the garlic-infused oil over medium heat.
Add the sumac to the pan and stir for 1 minute.
In a large casserole dish, create a layer of toasted pita bread.
Add a layer of roasted mushrooms on top of the pita bread.
Sprinkle crumbly feta cheese over the mushrooms.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a layer of feta cheese on top.
